exrna.title: ExRNA
exrna.scope: ExRNA is a peer-reviewed, open-access journal dedicated to the publication of innovative research in the field of extracellular RNA. The journal covers a wide variety of RNAs in the extracellular environment, including but not limited to miRNAs, siRNAs, piRNAs, lncRNAs, and circRNAs, and their roles in basic biology, disease mechanisms, and therapeutic development.

asymmetry.title: Asymmetry
asymmetry.scope: Asymmetry is a peer-reviewed, open-access journal that publishes high-quality research on all aspects of asymmetry, spanning chemistry, biology, physics, materials science, and related interdisciplinary fields. The journal welcomes fundamental and applied studies on chiral phenomena, asymmetric synthesis, asymmetric catalysis, and structural and functional asymmetry across natural and artificial systems.
